{"bash_command":"git","full_command":"git add docs/specs/032-beads-formula-gates/spec.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
spec: rework 032 as native beads integration (compose, don't wrap)

Broadened scope from just fixing gates to rearchitecting the entire
beads integration layer. Mindspec becomes a thin agentic workflow on
top of beads formulas/molecules rather than a Go SDK wrapping bd CLI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit updated spec"}

{"bash_command":"git","full_command":"git add docs/adr/ADR-0012.md docs/specs/032-beads-formula-gates/spec.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
adr: add ADR-0012 compose with external CLIs, don't wrap them

Codifies the principle that mindspec delegates work tracking to beads
via direct exec.Command calls rather than maintaining a Go wrapper
layer. Motivated by the gate.go breakage and broader wrapping fragility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit ADR and spec update"}

{"bash_command":"git","full_command":"git add docs/adr/ADR-0013.md docs/specs/032-beads-formula-gates/spec.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
adr: add ADR-0013 use beads formulas for spec lifecycle orchestration

Declares the spec lifecycle as a TOML formula instantiated via bd pour,
replacing ~400 lines of imperative Go molecule construction. Companion
to ADR-0012 (compose, don't wrap).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit ADR-0013 and spec update"}
{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd pour test-lifecycle --var spec_id=999-test --json 2>&1","description":"Test bd pour and check JSON output format"}
{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd mol pour test-lifecycle --var spec_id=999-test --json 2>&1","description":"Pour the test formula into a molecule"}
{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd dep tree mindspec-mol-ihq 2>&1","description":"Show molecule dependency tree"}
{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd mol show mindspec-mol-ihq --json 2>&1","description":"Show full molecule structure"}
{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd ready --json 2>&1","description":"Check what's ready (should be spec step only)"}
{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd ready --parent mindspec-mol-ihq --json 2>&1","description":"Check ready steps within the molecule"}
{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd show mindspec-mol-vd9 --json 2>&1","description":"Check the spec step (should be unblocked)"}

{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd list --status=open --json 2>&1 | python3 -c \"import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f'{i[\\\"id\\\"]}: {i[\\\"title\\\"]}') for i in data if 'mol' in i['id']]\"","description":"Check molecule issues in open list"}
{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd update mindspec-mol-vd9 --status in_progress 2>&1 && bd mol current 2>&1","description":"Claim the spec step and check current"}
{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd close mindspec-mol-vd9 --reason \"spec written\" 2>&1 && bd ready --json 2>&1","description":"Close spec step, check if approve-spec becomes ready"}
{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd blocked 2>&1","description":"Check blocked after closing spec step"}

{"bash_command":"bd","full_command":"bd close mindspec-mol-9dc mindspec-mol-zmz mindspec-mol-662 mindspec-mol-ecj mindspec-mol-nb9 mindspec-mol-ihq --reason \"test cleanup\" 2>&1","description":"Clean up test molecule"}

{"bash_command":"git","full_command":"git add docs/specs/032-beads-formula-gates/spec.md docs/adr/ADR-0012.md docs/adr/ADR-0013.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
spec: resolve open questions via bd mol pour experimentation

Tested formula/molecule flow against beads 0.50.3. Key findings:
- CLI is `bd mol pour` not `bd pour`
- Step IDs are hash-based with id_mapping in JSON output
- `bd ready` excludes molecule children; use `--mol` flag
- Cook step is optional (pour cooks inline)

Updated spec, ADR-0012, and ADR-0013 with correct CLI commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit resolved questions and CLI corrections"}
